purpose: Lightweight maintenance notes and future-task ideas that are not yet formal GitHub issues.

usage_guidance.source_of_truth: GitHub Issues are the source of truth for active scoped work, acceptance criteria, labels, dependencies, and milestones.
usage_guidance.promotion_rule: When a suggestion becomes actionable, convert it into a GitHub issue instead of expanding this file into a second issue tracker.

future_tasks.title: Expand release support beyond Intel-only builds
future_tasks.description: Add Apple Silicon (ARM64) macOS and Linux ARM binaries to release workflow. Update Homebrew formula for ARM support. Tracked by #102.

future_tasks.title: Add cross-platform CI test jobs
future_tasks.description: Add Windows and macOS cargo test jobs to CI. Currently only Ubuntu is tested. Tracked by #104.

future_tasks.title: Add additional selectors
future_tasks.description: Support resource name, address, module path, or provider filters in addition to the existing type/action include and exclude filters.

future_tasks.title: Parse Terraform state files
future_tasks.description: Build toward inventory, drift-analysis, and reporting workflows by parsing Terraform state files. Tracked by #27.

future_tasks.title: Add config helper commands
future_tasks.description: Add explicit config generation or validation commands for .terraform-plan-parser.toml files.

future_tasks.title: Validate Terraform version compatibility
future_tasks.description: Check the installed Terraform version before live plan/show execution and report unsupported versions clearly.

future_tasks.title: Add CI policy presets
future_tasks.description: Offer named policy presets for common create/update/delete guardrails on top of the existing --fail-on flag.

notes: Cargo.toml is the canonical dependency manifest; Cargo.lock records the resolved binary dependency graph.
Keep README.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md aligned with cargo run -- --help whenever CLI flags change.
Run the maintenance checks before committing user-facing changes.
Promote actionable future tasks into GitHub Issues before assigning labels, dependencies, milestones, or acceptance criteria.
